name: Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup orange juice or any fruit juice
1 pound seeded raisins, cut in halves
1/4 pound conserved cherries, cut in pieces
1/4 pound nut meats, chopped into bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and reserve 1/2 cup. Add baking powder and spices to the remaining 1 1/2 cups of flour and sift again.
2. Beat egg yolks separately, wash fruit, cut as directed, and dry between two towels.
3. Pulse nuts and fruit (excluding sultanas) with a coarse cutter; lightly dredge with the reserved 1/2 cup flour and mix thoroughly.
4. Cream butter and sugar. Add beaten egg yolks, flour mixture, and liquid alternately.
5. Stir in the fruit and nuts, then fold in the beaten egg whites. Mix orange rind into the fruit juice.
6. Ensure all ingredients are well combined.
7. Bake in a well-greased pan at moderate temperature for three hours. For extra moisture, steam half the baking time, then finish in the oven.
8. After cooling, pour over the cake 1/2 cup brandy to keep it moist; wrap and store in tin until ready to use. If kept longer, add more brandy as needed before cutting.
